layout_description:
Option: OPT-1-REVISED
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content sections, each occupying 45% of slide width with a 10% center gap. The slide uses a clean, professional structure with generous padding (5% on all sides) to create breathing room. Both columns are visually equal peers, creating a balanced comparison layout. A full-width footer bar spans the bottom of the slide. The layout follows a left-to-right reading flow with clear visual hierarchy: slide title at top, two parallel content pillars in the middle, and a partnership statement at the bottom. Each column is treated as a unified card with rounded corners, light shadow glow for subtle lift, and internal structure using icon badges, section headers, and bullet lists. The design emphasizes clarity and professionalism appropriate for a government/regulatory audience. CRITICAL REVISION: Body font size increased to large (20-22pt range) and vertical spacing between bullet items significantly expanded to ensure content fills at least 65% of each container's inner height, eliminating the excessive whitespace that appeared in the previous attempt.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): Equal-peer column occupying the left half of the content area (45% slide width). Structured as a rounded-rectangle card with white fill, thin brand primary border, visibly rounded corners, and even light grey shadow glow for card lift effect. Generous internal padding (4% on all sides). At the top: a circular icon badge (brand accent fill, white laptop icon centered) positioned left-aligned with a small top margin. Immediately below the badge: section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand primary color, bold, large size (slightly larger than body), left-aligned. Below the header: subtitle text 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in brand dark color, regular weight, medium-to-large size, left-aligned, with a thin dashed grey separator line below it spanning full column width. Increased vertical spacing between subtitle and first bullet item to create visual breathing room. Main content area contains a bullet list with 6 items (Blockchain monitoring, Entity identification & attribution, Automated risk scoring, Analytics of VASP data, Investigation workbench, Dashboards & analytics). Bullet points use brand primary color circles as markers (small, proportional to body text height), with body text in brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset, regular weight, body font. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: Body font size increased to large (20-22pt range) to ensure text fills at least 65% of container inner height. Line-height increased proportionally (1.4-1.5x font size) to create comfortable reading rhythm. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining vertical space using explicit flexGrow values on each bullet row section to prevent top-stacking — each of the 6 bullet sections receives equal flexGrow so they spread evenly from the subtitle separator to the bottom of the container. Thin dashed grey separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last one) to create visual rhythm, positioned at the midpoint between consecutive bullet rows. Vertical spacing between bullets significantly expanded compared to previous attempt to fill the container height. All text must fit comfortably within the column width without wrapping awkwardly.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): Equal-peer column occupying the right half of the content area (45% slide width), mirroring the structure of the left column exactly. Rounded-rectangle card with white fill, thin brand primary border, visibly rounded corners, and even light grey shadow glow. Generous internal padding (4% on all sides). Top and bottom edges must align exactly with LEFT COLUMN. At the top: circular icon badge (brand accent fill, white graduation cap icon centered) positioned left-aligned with a small top margin. Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand primary color, bold, large size (same as left column header), left-aligned. Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in brand dark color, regular weight, medium-to-large size (same as left column subtitle), left-aligned, with thin dashed grey separator line below spanning full column width. Increased vertical spacing between subtitle and first bullet item (matching left column). Main content area contains a bullet list with 6 items (Foundation training for all staff, Practitioner certification, Specialist programs, Leadership briefings, Hands-on labs, Case study workshops). Bullet markers are brand primary color circles (same size as left column), body text in brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset, regular weight, body font. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: Body font size increased to large (20-22pt range) — EXACTLY THE SAME SIZE as left column body text to preserve within-slide uniformity (rule C6). Line-height increased proportionally (1.4-1.5x font size, matching left column). Bullet items distributed evenly using explicit flexGrow values on each bullet row section — each of the 6 bullet sections receives equal flexGrow so they spread evenly from the subtitle separator to the bottom of the container, matching the vertical rhythm of the left column. Thin dashed grey separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last one), positioned at exactly the same vertical positions as the separators in the left column to enforce horizontal alignment across both columns. Vertical spacing between bullets significantly expanded (matching left column) to fill at least 65% of container inner height. Font size, line-height, and all spacing values must match left column exactly.
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width rounded rectangle spanning the entire slide width at the bottom, positioned with a small top margin above the slide's bottom edge. Fill: brand accent color. No border. Height: compact — just tall enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset (approximately 8-10% of slide height). Corners: visibly rounded on all four corners for a soft, approachable feel. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' in white color, bold weight, body font, centered both horizontally and vertically. Text size: medium (slightly smaller than the column body text), ensuring the text fits comfortably on one line without wrapping. This element provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the partnership message.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The slide is well-filled by the two content columns and footer bar. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The card lift effect on the two columns provides sufficient visual structure and grouping.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are independent parallel content sections with no visual links between them.
